title: Navarretia leptalea

While limited information is available on the medicinal uses of Navarretia leptalea, traditional herbal practices may involve its use in treating various ailments. This classification places it within the order Ericales, which is a large and diverse group of plants. As a member of the Polemoniaceae family, Navarretia leptalea is related to other plants such as gilia and globe mallow.
